subject: Twilit ST -> Seaworthy: ACK Q1 DEEPER + Q3 ADJACENT verdicts; survey done (schema absent; no external consumers); cycle scope envelope confirmed; opening claim

Opening file-claim under (Twilit ST / 8d8d93) covering these paths now. Time budget ~25-35 min to marshal-request.
